_meta.title: MSSQL → MySQL 쿼리/DML 구문 변환
_meta.description: SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE, CTE, 페이징, 조인, 서브쿼리 변환

rules.src: SELECT TOP n col FROM table
rules.tgt: SELECT col FROM table LIMIT n
rules.note: TOP n → LIMIT n (쿼리 끝으로 이동)

rules.src: SELECT TOP (n) PERCENT col FROM table
rules.tgt: SELECT col FROM table LIMIT ROUND(cnt * n / 100)
rules.note: TOP n PERCENT → 서브쿼리로 총 건수 계산 후 LIMIT

rules.tgt: -- TOP WITH TIES → MySQL 미지원. 윈도우 함수로 재작성 필요

rules.src: ORDER BY col OFFSET n ROWS FETCH NEXT m ROWS ONLY
rules.tgt: ORDER BY col LIMIT m OFFSET n
rules.note: 페이징 — OFFSET/FETCH → LIMIT m OFFSET n

rules.src: OFFSET n ROWS FETCH FIRST m ROWS ONLY
rules.tgt: LIMIT m OFFSET n
FROM `table`
rules.note: NOLOCK 힌트 제거. MySQL InnoDB는 MVCC로 더티 리드 없음

rules.tgt: FROM `table` t
FOR UPDATE
-- HOLDLOCK → MySQL에서 LOCK IN SHARE MODE 또는 FOR SHARE
LOCK TABLES `table` WRITE
LOCK TABLES `table` WRITE

rules.src:
WITH cte AS (SELECT ...)
SELECT * FROM cte
rules.tgt:
WITH cte AS (SELECT ...)
SELECT * FROM cte

rules.src:
WITH cte AS (SELECT ... UNION ALL SELECT ... FROM cte WHERE ...)
SELECT * FROM cte
rules.tgt:
WITH RECURSIVE cte AS (SELECT ... UNION ALL SELECT ... FROM cte WHERE ...)
SELECT * FROM cte
rules.note: 재귀 CTE → WITH RECURSIVE 키워드 추가

rules.src: SELECT * FROM table PIVOT (SUM(val) FOR col IN ([a],[b],[c])) AS pvt
rules.tgt:
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN col='a' THEN val END) AS `a`,
  SUM(CASE WHEN col='b' THEN val END) AS `b`
FROM table
rules.note: PIVOT → CASE WHEN 집계로 수동 변환

rules.tgt: -- UNPIVOT → UNION ALL 또는 JSON으로 수동 변환

rules.src:
SET IDENTITY_INSERT [table] ON
INSERT INTO [table] ...
SET IDENTITY_INSERT [table] OFF
rules.tgt: INSERT INTO `table` ...
rules.note: MySQL AUTO_INCREMENT는 명시적 값 INSERT 가능. IDENTITY_INSERT 불필요

rules.src: INSERT INTO table OUTPUT INSERTED.id INTO @ids VALUES (...)
rules.tgt:
INSERT INTO `table` VALUES (...);
SET @id = LAST_INSERT_ID();
rules.note: OUTPUT INSERTED → LAST_INSERT_ID(). 다중 행은 별도 처리 필요

rules.src: UPDATE table SET col=val OUTPUT DELETED.col, INSERTED.col
rules.tgt: -- OUTPUT → MySQL 미지원. 업데이트 전 SELECT 후 UPDATE

rules.src: DELETE FROM table OUTPUT DELETED.* WHERE ...
rules.tgt: -- OUTPUT → MySQL 미지원. DELETE 전 SELECT로 확인

rules.src:
MERGE INTO target USING source ON (condition)
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE ...
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ...
rules.tgt:
INSERT INTO `target` (...) SELECT ... FROM source
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE col = VALUES(col)
rules.note: MERGE → INSERT...ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 또는 INSERT IGNORE

rules.src: IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM table WHERE id=@id) UPDATE ... ELSE INSERT ...
rules.tgt:
INSERT INTO `table` (...) VALUES (...)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE col=VALUES(col)
rules.note: 수동 UPSERT → INSERT ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE

rules.src: UPDATE t SET t.col = s.col FROM table1 t JOIN table2 s ON t.id = s.id
rules.tgt: UPDATE `table1` t JOIN `table2` s ON t.id = s.id SET t.col = s.col
rules.note: FROM 절 UPDATE → MySQL JOIN UPDATE 구문

rules.src: DELETE t FROM table1 t JOIN table2 s ON t.id = s.id WHERE s.flag=1
rules.tgt: DELETE t FROM `table1` t JOIN `table2` s ON t.id = s.id WHERE s.flag=1
rules.note: JOIN DELETE OK — 테이블 별칭 앞에 DELETE 명시

rules.tgt: CREATE TABLE `new_table` AS SELECT * FROM `source_table`
rules.note: SELECT INTO → CREATE TABLE AS SELECT

rules.tgt: INSERT INTO `table` SELECT ... FROM ...
LOAD DATA INFILE 'file.csv' INTO TABLE `table` FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','

rules.src: col NOT IN (SELECT col FROM table WHERE col IS NULL)
rules.tgt: col NOT IN (SELECT col FROM table WHERE col IS NOT NULL)
rules.note: NOT IN에 NULL 포함 시 항상 FALSE. MySQL도 동일 주의

rules.tgt: JOIN LATERAL
LEFT JOIN LATERAL

rules.src: SELECT * FROM t1 EXCEPT SELECT * FROM t2
rules.tgt: SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t2 WHERE t1.id=t2.id)
rules.note: EXCEPT → NOT EXISTS 또는 LEFT JOIN IS NULL

rules.src: SELECT * FROM t1 INTERSECT SELECT * FROM t2
rules.tgt: SELECT t1.* FROM t1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t2 WHERE t1.id=t2.id)
UNION ALL
UNION
GROUP BY col WITH ROLLUP
-- CUBE → MySQL 미지원. ROLLUP 또는 UNION으로 수동 구현
-- GROUPING SETS → MySQL 미지원. UNION ALL로 수동 구현
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

rules.src: CASE WHEN col = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
rules.tgt: CASE WHEN col = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
WHERE col IS NULL

rules.note: SET ANSI_NULLS → MySQL 미지원, 제거. MySQL은 기본적으로 ANSI NULL

rules.tgt: CONCAT(col1, ' ', col2)
rules.note: + 문자열 연결 → CONCAT(). NULL 포함 시 CONCAT_WS 고려

rules.tgt: USE `database_name`
